description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic mix of colors and materials. The upper is primarily a mottled yellow and brown synthetic or textile material, complemented by smooth gray and blue overlays that add structure and style. The shoe has bright yellow laces threaded through reinforced eyelets, and a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The midsole is thick and blue, with sculpted details for both aesthetics and support, while the outsole appears robust and suitable for urban environments. A small red tab is visible at the heel, possibly for branding or as a pull tab. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with a mottled yellow-brown upper, blue and gray overlays, yellow laces, and a thick blue sole. Features a red heel tab and a visually striking, urban-ready design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered yellow, brown, blue, and gray materials, yellow laces, and the sculpted blue sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow laces, perforated gray toe box, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking, visible swooping overlay, and the red heel tab partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, red heel tab, and a stylized white marking on the black heel counter.
